perturbation.original_text: 7. SPONSORSHIP, ADVERTISING AND VARIABLE REVENUE SHARE FEES a) In exchange for XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX the Client will pay Excite sponsorship and advertising fees of XXXXXXXXXXX for the first year of the term of the Agreement. These fees will be paid in equal monthly installments 7 CONFIDENTIAL of XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX. The first monthly payment will be due upon the display of the first of the promotional placements and advertising described in the Agreement. Subsequent installments will be due on a monthly basis thereafter. XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.
perturbation.changed_text: 7. SPONSORSHIP, ADVERTISING AND VARIABLE REVENUE SHARE FEES a) In exchange for XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX the Client will pay Excite sponsorship and advertising fees of XXXXXXXXXXX for the first year of the term of the Agreement. These fees will be paid in equal monthly installments 7 CONFIDENTIAL of XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX. The first monthly payment will be due upon the display of the first of the promotional placements and advertising described in the Agreement. Subsequent installments will be due within 15 days of receipt of invoice. XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction regarding payment terms. The original text states that subsequent installments will be due on a monthly basis thereafter, indicating payments are tied to the display of promotional placements. The modified text specifies that the first monthly payment will be due upon the display of the first of the promotional placements and advertising described in the Agreement, and subsequent installments will be due within 15 days of receipt of invoice. This creates conflict, by implementing a new payment deadline that is not consistent with the first month and original text.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 7. SPONSORSHIP, ADVERTISING AND VARIABLE REVENUE SHARE FEES a) In exchange for XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX the Client will pay Excite sponsorship and advertising fees of XXXXXXXXXXX for the first year of the term of the Agreement. These fees will be paid in equal monthly installments 7 CONFIDENTIAL of XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX. The first monthly payment will be due upon the display of the first of the promotional placements and advertising described in the Agreement. Subsequent installments will be due within 15 days of receipt of invoice. XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the payment terms, stating that subsequent installments are due within 15 days of invoice receipt, which contradicts the original text's implication that payments are tied to the display of promotional placements on a monthly basis. The contradicted text further reinforces this new payment schedule, thereby solidifying the in-text contradiction. The change implements a new payment deadline for the subsequent payments that is not consistent with the first month payment, which is tied to the display of promotional placements.

perturbation.original_text: e) Client will pay Excite its variable revenue share payments within thirty (30) days after the close of each month.
perturbation.changed_text: e) Client will pay Excite its variable revenue share payments within forty-five (45) days after the close of each month.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by modifying the payment deadline for variable revenue share payments. Initially, payment was due within thirty (30) days after the close of each month. Now, payment is due within forty-five (45) days after the close of each month. This contradicts with Section 7(a), which states that the first monthly payment will be due upon the display of the first of the promotional placements and advertising described in the Agreement. Subsequent installments will be due within 15 days of receipt of invoice.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 7. SPONSORSHIP, ADVERTISING AND VARIABLE REVENUE SHARE FEES a) In exchange for XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX the Client will pay Excite sponsorship and advertising fees of XXXXXXXXXXX for the first year of the term of the Agreement. These fees will be paid in equal monthly installments 7 CONFIDENTIAL of XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX. The first monthly payment will be due upon the display of the first of the promotional placements and advertising described in the Agreement. Subsequent installments will be due within 15 days of receipt of invoice. XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX. e) Client will pay Excite its variable revenue share payments within forty-five (45) days after the close of each month.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'thirty (30) days' to 'forty-five (45) days' directly contradicts Section 7(a). Section 7(a) states that 'Subsequent installments will be due within 15 days of receipt of invoice'. The changed text specifies payment within 45 days after the close of the month, while Section 7(a) specifies a different timeframe, namely 15 days after receipt of invoice for subsequent installments, thus creating a clear inconsistency regarding payment deadlines. The inconsistency falls under the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.
